title: quercus castaneifolia
intro: Quercus castaneifolia is an evergreen tree species in the Fagaceae family, native to the Himalayan region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. Quercus castaneifolia is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and aiding in digestion. The herbal preparations of Quercus castaneifolia include decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to create traditional medicine and other products.
